accurate.why: Dollar amounts, percentages, and program descriptions match the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the act as extending federal aviation programs and trust fund authorities through May 2024.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the act extends prior statutory expiration dates.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the obligation authority through September 30, 2024, and the 39% apportionment reduction condition.

effective_dates.why: Correctly identifies May 10 and May 11, 2024, extension dates and March 8, 2024, enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers AIP, FAA operations, facilities, research, trust fund expenditure authority, aviation taxes, and counter-UAS.

concise.why: Covers major categories concisely without exhaustively listing every program.

correct_entities.why: FAA, Airport Improvement Program, Internal Revenue Code, Airport and Airway Trust Fund, and Homeland Security Act correctly referenced.

correct_figures.why: All dollar amounts, the 39% reduction figure, and dates match the bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
